reviews.review_description:
The devs completely abandoned the game because 
There weren't enough players don't buy no more updates
EDIT: they responded with a smiley face new pets VR coming? It's been awhile since a update for a game so I don't know if there just saying that I bumped up the review

developer_response.body: Not at all! :) New Pets VR is coming...

reviews.review_description: My niece really loved this game when it was first released. It hasn't been updated since then.

I only played with the dog, and sometimes he says he wants something, but just stays there... e.g. pop bubbles, he shows sleep "zzz"s, but doesn't move to his bed nor interact with anything - if this is a bug, please fix, if i'm supposed to do something make it more clear what.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks for your feedback, I have already shown it to our developers and they are working really hard to find out what could be causing this weird behavior and how we can fix this. Thanks again and have fun!

reviews.review_title: Only 2 pets but charming so far.
reviews.review_description:
Impressions Video with Commentary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VfggyfMHv4E

My Initial Impressions:
Charming animations and interactions, but still being developed. (Only  pets on offer and no shop yet)  An ideal game for younger VR users.

I was excited to show this game off for my puppy loving daughter the other day, but it was broken with a very disorienting visual glitch that messed with our eyes. Less than 48 hours later an update came out and fixed the issue. I appreciate the quick response with this update, because My daughter loves this game. She wants a puppy so bad, but because she is extremely allergic, we don't know if we can ever let her have one. To her, this is as close as it gets to having a puppy of her own to take care of.

developer_response.body:
Hey!

Thanks for giving PetsVR a second try! We're genuinely so happy to hear that your daughter can enjoy her time with pets regardless of her allergy. Stay updated because we're gonna release some new features soon! Who knows, maybe even a new four-legged friend?

reviews.review_description:
the game is especially great for younger players. In some way, kids can learn that having a dog or a cat is not only petting it, but also responsibility, you have to feed it, take it out, take care of it. However, there is one big problem with the dog, his artificial intelligence will fail and instead of doing one thing, he goes to do something else and he freezes

Update:
tomorrow there will be a video on my YouTube channel where you can see a few bugs and I am talking about what would be useful to add to the game 😉

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thanks for leaving a review, it means the world to us! If You encountered any bugs in the game then we would highly appreciate it if You could send us some footage of it or any other kind of data so that we can look further into this and hopefully fix it :)

reviews.review_title: First dog won't go to bath
reviews.review_description: Great concept, but for our first dog after playing for a while he just sits there barking at us, with a sponge over his head. Tried everything to get him into the bath, getting sponge wet, soaped, tried cleaning him on the spot, tried attracting him with toys, scratching him, etc. He just walks to different areas of the house and barks with the sponge icon above his head. Buggy. Had my kid start a new game, hopefully the dog isn't broken this time...

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank You for Your feedback, maybe You could record this situation if it ever happens again and send it to our mail so that we can see if this is a bug and try to fix it :) Have a nice day :)

reviews.review_description:
It's overall a cute game. 

My only problems is when moving (not teleporting) or turning I get really disoriented; and the pets tend to freeze up and still make noise. I am not able to interact with them during this either.  

Pros: I can have a dog now.

developer_response.body:
Hi there!
Thanks for your feedback, we really appreciate it! I have already shown your problem to our developers and they are working really hard to figure it out and fix this bug. Also, you can change the way you turn in game and movement in general in the setting so this might help you with disorientation. Thanks again and I will write a follow up when we get to the bottom of this dog freeze bug and fix it. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: Game looks fun, I tried to play with the half cut screen but it was just annoying. So I guess this game is messed up, glitchy, or they just gave up. To bad it is a fun looking game

developer_response.body:
Hey!
We've been struggling with the black screen bug recently, it happened because of a recent Oculus update. But WE GOT IT FIXED! Please try to update your game, it should fix this problem you've got. We really want you to enjoy our game the way it was designed and without any disturbances. Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description:
…both pets are stuck  showing the „zzz“ over their heads and won’t do anything any more. Developers seem to have abandoned the game too.  

@ Devs, Doesn’t get better after latest updates. Same thing evertime we restart.

developer_response.body: Hey MaxBlast, thank you for your review. No, we did not abandon the game - stay tuned for a new update with a lot of new features :)

reviews.review_description: Hello about a week about I sent an email telling you how my game won't download and won't let me delete the app, it sounds weird but it's all true. I need some help on how to fix it will you please help?

developer_response.body: Hi there, we responded to Your mail and hope that our suggestion resolved your problem. If You'd have any other problems, You can send us a mail any time, and we'll try to help.

reviews.review_description: I bought because my kids asked, but it doesn’t work. After you do 3 tasks the pets just don’t do anything besides walking. Most stuff doesn’t work. It’s just stealing money. This should not be out as it is, not even as a developing game
It's really bad after you complete a pet there's nothing else for you to do
Not the best game out there not that fun

the game is lovely made but on quest2 I habe a left side black screen. there ist something wrong and hope the developer will fix this as soon as possible

edit: after the last update the app works fine.

developer_response.body:
Hey!
Thanks for giving PetsVR a shot after the update, and sharing your review! It means the world to us. Stay tuned, we're preparing some B I G content updates.

reviews.review_description: I bought this without reading the reviews. I wish I would have read them first at least it was only 4.99. There’s only two animals to choose from. They come with standard colors. You don’t do anything but follow them around and do what they want. And they’re abnormally big. After downloading this I found I Am Cat and that was the game to get!
I’ve had it for 2 weeks and it was fine until there was an update and I think it’s been updating for a week I can’t cancel it I can’t play any games as most of them need updates

developer_response.body: hey, thank you for your comment! We've checked what can cause this on our side but couldn't detect the potential bug. We've already contacted Oculus Dev Support to fix this issue. We'll let you know while we know the reason why this happens but we suggest that you could also contact Oculus Support to fix the app update issue. Anyway, thank you for checking our game, we're doing our best to find out what can cause this problem!

reviews.review_description: I really like the idea of the game, but there seems to be a problem. I have bought it today. I have showered the dog once and clipped it's nails. However, after a few moments the dog again requested nail clipping and it keeps asking for it. I have grabbed the clipper but the dog doesn't go on the table. Instead it runs around and jumps on the sofa. I tried clipping it's nails there but nope. The dog jumps on the ground and keeps requesting nail clipping. This goes on and on and the dog just doesn't go to the table. I restarted the game but then the same kind of loop started with showering. I started the shower but the dog doesn't go into it. It just runs around requesting a shower.  I even chased it with the sponge. I hope this can be solved because I really like the idea of the game, but at this moment its unplayable...

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are really sorry to hear that your time in the game was interrupted, we have already shown it to our developers and they are working really hard to fix this bug. Getting out of the dog room and coming back inside was proven to be effective in this kind of scenario before so i suggest trying that and we will try our best to fix this as fast as possible.

reviews.review_description: The game jam my oculus, can't use my oculus at all I'm so mad about your game can't even uninstall it cause the game keep doing an update since the last update so can't do nothing with my oculus  you need to fix this cause ya game keep crashing my oculus and its one week can't update other games or my oculus

developer_response.body:
Hey! 
I've contacted our IT brach and developers responsible for creating PetsVR, and so far nothing like this happened before. We strongly believe that unfortunately something bad happened within your Oculus device and our game is not responsible for that. However, we're deeply sorry for your inconvenience. We contacted our IT specialists and propose two solutions to your problem. The first is to perform a factory reset to your device. It will most likely help, HOWEVER, it will also wipe all your data on your device!  The second option is to connect your Oculus device to your computer and manually uninstall PetsVR through sidequest. We advise you to try out the second option before you decide whether you do or do not want to perform a factory reset. 
Like I mention before, we're deeply sorry that this happened to you, but it is not the fault of ours or our game.
We encourage you to try out our game when you deal with this problem and give us a fair review of what you think about our game!

reviews.review_title: Cute pet sim. Runs great now!
reviews.review_description:
EDIT: The display bug was fixed, and the game runs great!

The presentation is excellent, and everything feels intuitive to use. Looking forward to supporting this dev! 

This is a great looking pet game. My kid is/was super excited to play. Unfortunately, the left 3rd of the display is completely black. The game is unplayable at the moment. 

I will update this review if/when the bug is fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hey!

Thank you for checking out PetsVR and sharing your review with us! We've got this bug fixed as soon as we could, and we're so happy to hear that you enjoy our game! We've got more updates coming, stay tuned!
